symptom: Engine overheating
possible_fault: Coolant leak, faulty radiator fan, stuck thermostat
beginner_steps: Turn off engine. Let it cool. Check coolant level and radiator fan operation.
mechanic_advice: If overheating continues, mechanic should inspect radiator, thermostat, or head gasket.
safety_warning: Never open radiator cap while engine is hot.

beginner_steps: Check transmission fluid level and condition.
